title: Dead Eye
description: A mod that accurately implements the time slowing effect "Dead Eye" from the Red Dead Redemption series. Formerly Deadeye Mod
body:
A mod that accurately implements the time slowing effect "Dead Eye" from the Red Dead Redemption series. Use it to be more fast and precise with your shots, or mark your targets which does the shooting for you with great accuracy. [Join our Discord server for help!](https://discord.gg/BgydFFysXz)
Weapon in the gif is from Red Dead Weaponry.

Text Description - Transcription for images below

Dead Eye (Previously Deadeye Mod)



A mod that accurately implements the time slowing effect "Dead Eye" from the Red Dead Redemption series. Use it to be more fast and precise with your shots, or mark your targets which does the shooting for you with great accuracy.

Features

  • A very close to original implementation of Dead Eye mechanics, including visual and sound effects.
  • Using bow and crossbows in Dead Eye to defeat your enemies with insane precision.
  • Items such as cigars and tonics to replenish your Dead Eye core and meter. These can be sourced from tobacco crops around the world. Eating and sleeping helps refilling as well.
  • Supports usage of weapons from popular mods such as Vic’s Point Blank, Timeless and Classics Zero and a few more. (See below)
  • Many config options to personalize your experience.

Gun Mods

  • Fully supports: Vic’s Point Blank, Timeless and Classics Zero, Just Enough Guns, Scorched Guns 2, Simple Animated Guns
  • Marking and shooting targets with weapons from that mod.
  • Reload the weapon instantly when Dead Eye is enabled. (Can be disabled in config)
  • Improved weapon accuracy, spread and fire rate while Dead Eye is enabled.
  • No weapon draw cooldown while Dead Eye is enabled.

Credits

Namefix

Creator, Programming & Textures

Frozern

tobacco crop textures
